name: Djinn Prognosticator of Rituals
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>儀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>式</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>プレコグスター
desc: When you Ritual Summon a monster, you can banish this card from your GY as 1 of the monsters required for the Ritual Summon. If you Ritual Summon using this card, if that Ritual Summoned monster inflicts battle damage to your opponent, they discard 1 card.
mnst_eff: When you Ritual Summon a monster, you can banish this card from your GY as 1 of the monsters required for the Ritual Summon. If you Ritual Summon using this card, if that Ritual Summoned monster inflicts battle damage to your opponent, they discard 1 card.
eff: When you Ritual Summon a monster, you can banish this card from your GY as 1 of the monsters required for the Ritual Summon. If you Ritual Summon using this card, if that Ritual Summoned monster inflicts battle damage to your opponent, they discard 1 card.

sets.set: Speed Duel Starter Decks: Match of the Millennium

action: Applies effect when used for a Ritual Summon
Activates if battle damage is inflicted
banished: Banishes monsters from Graveyard for Ritual Summon
